decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to play powerful threats like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer. Sazh's Chocobo and Ba Sing Se provide additional aggression and evasion, while Meltstrider's Resolve and Escape Tunnel help push through opponent's defenses. Badgermole Cub acts as a resilient threat to grow with each attack. The deck looks to overwhelm opponents with a combination of speed, power, and evasion, aiming to win the game before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

This Azorius Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying evasive creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, while utilizing Springleaf Drum to ramp up mana. Starfield Shepherd and Cosmogrand Zenith provide resilience and disruption against opponents' strategies. Haliya, Guided by Light and Quantum Riddler offer card advantage and protection. Seam Rip and Parting Gust serve as removal spells to clear the way for your creatures. The deck aims to control the board early and maintain pressure on the opponent to secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly casting low-cost spells and creatures to put pressure on the opponent. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, as well as bouncing spells such as Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off, the deck aims to deal damage efficiently and control the board. The inclusion of Eddymurk Crab and Elusive Otter helps to provide additional threats that are difficult to deal with. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy with lands that produce the necessary colors of mana for the spells in the deck.

The deck focuses on utilizing the graveyard as a resource to bring back powerful creatures and spells to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like "Doomsday Excruciator" and "Requiting Hex" to fill the graveyard, and then using "Bitter Triumph" and "Superior Spider-Man" to reanimate key threats, the deck aims to create explosive turns to secure victory. Additionally, cards like "Deadly Cover-Up" and "Duress" provide disruption and protection to ensure the combo pieces can come together smoothly. The deck's strategy revolves around setting up the graveyard and executing powerful reanimation plays to dominate the game.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a quick and aggressive strategy using a variety of creatures and spells that generate value and tempo. With a focus on ramp and efficient creatures like Llanowar Elves and Badgermole Cub, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on. Ba Sing Se and Earthbender Ascension provide additional value and card advantage, while Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Surrak, Elusive Hunter offer powerful finishers to close out the game. Overall, the deck is designed to apply pressure and control the battlefield in order to secure a swift victory.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle using small, low-cost creatures and support cards to quickly build a board presence. By utilizing cards like Haliya, Guided by Light and Starfield Shepherd, the deck aims to maintain control of the battlefield while steadily chipping away at the opponent's life total. The deck also includes removal spells like Get Lost and Seam Rip for disruption, as well as cards like Springleaf Drum for mana acceleration. Overall, the deck focuses on rushing down the opponent and maintaining pressure throughout the game.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to use a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock provide ways to deal with the opponent's creatures, while Winternight Stories and Opt help filter through the deck and find key cards. The deck aims to control the board and outvalue the opponent with efficient spells and creatures, ultimately leading to victory through card advantage and strategic play.

This deck focuses on utilizing low mana cost spells and creatures to quickly overwhelm opponents with fast and aggressive plays. By using cards like Burst Lightning and Slickshot Show-Off to deal direct damage, combined with efficient creatures like Elusive Otter and Eddymurk Crab, the deck aims to maintain board presence and control while applying pressure. With the ability to draw cards and manipulate the board with cards like Sleight of Hand and Boomerang Basics, the UR Aggro deck can quickly close out games before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this mono green aggro deck is to quickly build up a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Mossborn Hydra, while utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to enhance their abilities. Fabled Passage and Promising Vein help fix mana and ramp, while Ba Sing Se provides additional protection for our creatures. Icetill Explorer and Sazh's Chocobo offer additional card advantage, while Esper Origins can help us recover from board wipes. Llanowar Elves and Escape Tunnel help us ramp and ensure we have the necessary mana to play our threats.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence and dealing damage to the opponent as efficiently as possible. By utilizing cheap spells and creatures with abilities that can bounce or disrupt the opponent's strategies, the deck aims to maintain control of the battlefield and pressure the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Stormchaser's Talent and Slickshot Show-Off allows for additional chip damage and card advantage, while cards like Eddymurk Crab and Elusive Otter provide solid bodies to apply pressure. The deck's game plan is to be fast, aggressive, and disruptive.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to control the game by countering opponent's spells and removing threats with efficient removal spells. The deck includes a mix of creatures with evasion and spells that can draw cards, counter spells, and deal damage to the opponent or creatures. By maintaining control of the board and hand advantage, the deck aims to disrupt opponent's game plan and eventually win by overwhelming them with powerful spells. The key strategy is to carefully manage resources and make optimal decisions to outplay the opponent.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures with fast pacing and aggression, aiming to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It includes cards that generate tokens, ramp up mana, and provide support to maintain board presence. The deck also incorporates synergy between creatures and spells, alongside disruptive elements to control the game. By efficiently managing resources and incorporating a mix of creatures and spells with different abilities, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent and secure victory through aggressive combat and strategic plays.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. By effectively managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent over time. The inclusion of cards like Monument to Endurance and Riverpyre Verge also provides additional utility and card advantage. Overall, the deck focuses on staying ahead in the game by making calculated decisions and outsmarting the opponent through strategic gameplay.

The main focus of this deck is to control the opponent's actions by countering spells and using removal cards while also being able to draw cards and deal damage. The deck utilizes a combination of counterspells like Spell Pierce and Spell Snare, removal spells like Abrade and Burst Lightning, and card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. It also includes creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental to provide additional threats and ways to control the board. Overall, the deck aims to maintain control of the game until it can win with its own threats and card advantage.

The main focus of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to quickly ramp up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, while using Ba Sing Se to generate extra tokens. Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer boost creature power, allowing for fast and powerful attacks. Other cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Royal Treatment provide additional utility and removal options. This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing a variety of creatures and spells to maintain pressure and control the board.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of card draw, board control, and mana ramp to delay the opponent's game plan and establish dominance in the late game. Using a variety of spells like Consult the Star Charts and Pyroclasm, along with creatures like Agna Qel'a and Mightform Harmonizer, this deck focuses on maintaining control of the battlefield while steadily building up resources. By efficiently managing resources and controlling the board, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful late-game threats and secure victory.
